# Volume Discounts

At Acme Shop, customers can benefit from competitive volume discounts when purchasing in bulk. To qualify for these discounts, a minimum order of 50 units of a single product SKU is required, with discount tiers offering 5% off for 50 to 99 units, 10% off for 100 to 199 units, and 15% off for over 200 units. Volume discounts are applied automatically at checkout but cannot be combined with other promotions or applied to sale items, and processing for bulk orders takes an extra 2–3 business days. Returns or cancellations will adjust the discount based on the new order total, which may affect eligibility for the discount.

[Source: bulk_orders.md#volume-discounts]
